    • FAQs

      Questions you may have, answered with
      • What are the key camera features of the Google Pixel 7 Pro?
        The Google Pixel 7 Pro boasts advanced camera capabilities, including a triple-lens setup with wide, ultra-wide, and telephoto options. Key features include improved night sight, real tone technology for accurate skin tones, and Magic Eraser for photo editing. These features enhance photo quality and versatility in various lighting conditions.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • What display technology is used in the Pixel 7 Pro?
        The Pixel 7 Pro features a 6.7-inch LTPO OLED display, providing a dynamic refresh rate up to 120Hz. This technology allows for smoother scrolling and better responsiveness, making it ideal for gaming and high-definition video streaming. The high resolution and HDR support ensure vivid colors and deep blacks.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • Can the Pixel 7 Pro's software enhance daily usage?
        Yes, the Pixel 7 Pro runs on Google's Android operating system, integrated with AI and machine learning features like live translation, voice typing, and adaptive battery technology. These features streamline daily tasks, improve user interaction, and optimize battery usage for longer performance.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
